patterns.label: coercive_ambiguity
patterns.description: Mixed messaging used to preserve leverage while avoiding a binary commitment.

patterns.label: selective_access_squeeze
patterns.description: Control shifts to deciding who moves, when, and under what protection.

patterns.label: stakeholder_revelation
patterns.description: Infrastructure pressure forces hidden stakeholders to reveal priorities and dependencies.

patterns.label: escort_escalation_trap
patterns.description: Protective shipping architecture creates clearer targets and a new casus belli loop.

patterns.label: proxy_modulation
patterns.description: Proxy layers are activated selectively rather than released as a single unified bloc.

patterns.label: regime_survival_finance
patterns.description: A sanctioned or pressured state preserves strategic endurance through parallel revenue and logistics rails.
